subject: docs: sync all documentation with actual codebase state
body:
CLAUDE.md:
- Remove deleted src/utils/export.js from Architecture
- Update overlay count 26 → 34, layout preset count 27 → 35

README.md:
- Update platform count 22 → 28 formats across 12 groups
- Add complete format lists per platform (was missing most)
- Add freeform text mode, multi-page, and PWA to features
- Update overlay description to mention all 34 effects
- Fix export section: format selection, PDF via jsPDF, multi-page ZIP
- Add jsPDF and marked to tech stack

USER_GUIDE.md:
- Fix freeform markdown: "always parsed" → "optional toggle per cell"
- Add 4 corner radials and separate Textures from Effects in overlay list
- Rewrite Platform Selection for two-level selector with all 28 formats
- Rewrite Download Options for current export capabilities

TESTING_GUIDE.md:
- Update E1 for two-level platform selector (was flat button list)
- Fix LinkedIn test: 1200×627 → 1080×1080 (Square is first format)
- Update E2 for format selection and timestamp filenames
- Update E3 for multi-platform ZIP workflow (was "Download All")

TODO.md:
- Add ContextBar.jsx:210 confirm() to existing SaveLoadModal tracking item

Tags: docs, accuracy, audit
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: documentation
Semver: patch
